platform: PTL 12Xe (Intel Arc B390 96CUs @ 2400 MHz, treated as PTL Xe3)

config.layer_pattern: 5 sliding + 1 full (25 sliding layers + 5 full layers)

layer_breakdown.comment: 5:1 pattern — layers 0-4 sliding, 5 full, 6-10 sliding, 11 full, 12-16 sliding, 17 full, 18-22 sliding, 23 full, 24-28 sliding, 29 full

full.comment: Q=NH*HD=8192, K=NKV*HD=1024, V=K (attention_k_eq_v=true, no V proj), QK=Q+K=9216

fc_o_sliding.comment: Output projection for 25 sliding attention layers

fc_qk_full.comment: Fused Q(8192)+K(1024) for 5 full layers (V=K, no V proj)

fc_o_full.comment: Output projection for 5 full attention layers

fc_gate_dense.comment: Dense MLP gate proj (GEGLU), all 30 layers

fc_up_dense.comment: Dense MLP up proj (GEGLU), all 30 layers

fc_down_dense.comment: Dense MLP down proj, all 30 layers

pa_sliding.comment: PagedAttention for 25 sliding layers, S_kv capped by sliding_window=1024 for decode

pa_full.comment: PagedAttention for 5 full attention layers, full KV context

lm_head.comment: LM head (shared with embedding), INT8, single-token only

rmsnorm.comment: input_ln + post_attn_ln + pre_ff_ln + post_ff_ln per layer (MoE layers have extra norms)

notes.dense_mlp_parallel_moe: Dense MLP and MoE run in parallel for every layer. Both contribute to total latency.
notes.geglu_activation: Uses gelu_pytorch_tanh (GEGLU) instead of silu (SwiGLU). MoE bench needs GELU support.
notes.full_attn_v_eq_k: Full attention layers use attention_k_eq_v=true: V reuses K projection output, only Q and K projections needed.
notes.sliding_decode_kv_cap: For decode with sliding attention, KV length is capped at sliding_window=1024 regardless of total context.
notes.pa_full_sliding_split: PA must be profiled separately for sliding (NH=16,NKV=8,HD=256) and full (NH=16,NKV=2,HD=512) configs.
